use_cases: Landing page hero sections where you want to capture attention with dynamic visuals
Product feature showcases with interactive 3D card presentations
Premium dashboard widgets that respond to user hover interactions
Portfolio or showcase pages requiring floating card elements with depth
Subscription or pricing tiers displayed in an engaging, animated format
ai_summary: An interactive 3D floating card component featuring mouse-tracking perspective transforms, animated particle overlays, and theme toggling. The card responds to cursor position with smooth rotateX/rotateY transitions and subtle scale effects, creating a premium parallax-like interaction. Includes a particle system for ambient visual interest and supports both light and dark themes.
